title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers practical cybersecurity measures including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and best practices for protecting systems from cyber threats. The lecture is part of Harvard University's CS50 course series offered through edX and other platforms.
